title: wolfhsm: crate scaffold and error.rs
description: Create wolfhsm/Cargo.toml (features: cert, auth, she, mldsa; deps: wolfhsm-sys, wolfcrypt-rs vendored, thiserror, signature 2, digest 0.10, aead 0.5, p256 with ecdsa, ed25519 2). Create wolfhsm/src/lib.rs with mod declarations and feature-gated mod cert/auth/she. Implement error.rs: WolfHsmError enum mapping WH_ERROR_* constants (NotFound, NoSpace, Access, BadArgs, Aborted, Timeout, NotReady, BufferSize, LabelTooLong{max}, Other(i32)), marked #[non_exhaustive]; pub(crate) fn check(rc: i32) -> Result<(), Error>.
